CONTENT.Club career: He made his debut in the Russian Premier League for Zenit St. Petersburg on 11 September 2021 in a game against Akhmat Grozny. He made his European debut on 2 November 2021 in a Champions League game against Juventus.On 20 February 2022, Kuznetsov signed a five-year contract with Rubin Kazan.On 7 January 2024, Kuznetsov moved to Rodina Moscow on loan.
CONTENT.External links: Daniil Kuznetsov at SoccerwayDaniil Kuznetsov at Sportbox.ru (in Russian)Daniil Kuznetsov at Russian Premier League
CONTENT.International career: Kuznetsov was first called up to the Russia national football team for September 2023 camp.

SUMMARY: Daniil Andreyevich Kuznetsov (Russian: Даниил Андреевич Кузнецов; born 23 April 2003) is a Russian football player who plays as a winger (on left or right side) for Rubin Kazan.
